tool.name: OGS: Mesh2Shape
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'Mesh2Shape'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for mesh2shape #for $m in $input_file: --input-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output-file output_1.shp
tool.help: This tool runs the **Mesh2Shape** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
